languages.text: "Профессионализм жизнеформы "вивисектор" позволил мне восстановить максимально возможную эффективность. Как сказал бы мирянин, Мартинакс вернул меня к жизни. К сожалению, мой вертебральный имплант ему спасти не удалось". {n}Генетор издает печальный бинарный сигнал.{/n}
languages.translation_comment: Если отрезаны механодендриты (2/3 в руте вивисектора)

languages.text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Профессионализм жизнеформы "вивисектор" позволил мне восстановить максимально возможную эффективность. Как сказал бы мирянин, Мартинакс вернул меня к жизни. К сожалению, мой вертебральный имплант ему спасти не удалось". {n}Генетор издает печальный бинарный сигнал.{/n}

Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

"The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

"The professionalism of the Vivisector unit made it possible to restore the vital functions of this unit. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

"The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

"The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

languages.text: 「バイセクターの専門性のおかげで、このユニットの生命機能を回復することができた。一般の人なら、マルティナックスが私を蘇らせたと言える。残念ながら、彼は私の脊椎のインプラントを救うことができなかった」{n}ジェネターは悲痛なビナリック信号を発している。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector unit made it possible to restore the vital functions of this unit. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「バイセクターの専門性のおかげで、このユニットの生命機能を回復することができました。一般の人なら、マルティナックスが私を蘇らせたと言います。残念ながら、彼は私の脊椎のインプラントを救うことができませんでした。」{n}ジェネターは悲痛なビナリック信号を発している。{/n}

languages.text: "Dirikesimci yaşam formunun profesyonelliği, maksimum elde edilebilir verimliliği geri kazanmamı mümkün kıldı. Sıradan biri, Martinax'ın beni hayata döndürdüğünü söylerdi. Ne yazık ki omurga implantımı kurtaramadı." {n}Genetör, hüzünlü bir ikilidil sinyal yayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Dirikesimci yaşam formunun profesyonelliği, maksimum elde edilebilir verimliliği geri kazanmamı mümkün kıldı. Sıradan biri, Martinax'ın beni hayata döndürdüğünü söylerdi. Ne yazık ki omurga implantımı kurtaramadı." {n}Genetör, hüzünlü bir ikilidil sinyal yayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «La profesionalidad de la forma de vida vivisector hizo posible la restauración de la eficacia máxima posible. Un laico podría decir que Martinax me devolvió la vida. Por desgracia, fue incapaz de salvar mi implante vertebral». {n}El Genetor emite una señal binaria lastimera.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «La profesionalidad de la forma de vida vivisector hizo posible la restauración de la eficacia máxima posible. Un laico podría decir que Martinax me devolvió la vida. Por desgracia, fue incapaz de salvar mi implante vertebral». {n}El Genetor emite una señal binaria lastimera.{/n}

languages.text: “解剖者生命体的专业度使本生命体有可能恢复到可实现的最大效率。教外人士可能会认为，马丁纳克斯使得本生命体起死回生。但不幸的是，他没能保住我的脊椎植入物。”{n}基因士发出了一声凄厉的二进制信号。{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “解剖者生命体的专业度使本生命体有可能恢复到可实现的最大效率。教外人士可能会认为，马丁纳克斯使得本生命体起死回生。但不幸的是，他没能保住我的脊椎植入物。”{n}基因士发出了一声凄厉的二进制信号。{/n}

languages.text: « Le professionnalisme de l'entité vivisector m'a permis de retrouver un niveau d'efficacité atteignable optimal. En termes profanes, on pourrait dire que Martinax m'a ramené à la vie. Malheureusement, il n'a pas réussi à sauver mon implant vertébral, » {n}déclare-t-il en ponctuant son explication d'un signal binhaire plaintif.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Le professionnalisme de l'entité vivisector m'a permis de retrouver un niveau d'efficacité atteignable optimal. En termes profanes, on pourrait dire que Martinax m'a ramené à la vie. Malheureusement, il n'a pas réussi à sauver mon implant vertébral, » {n}déclare-t-il en ponctuant son explication d'un signal binhaire plaintif.{/n}

languages.text: "Dank der Professionalität der Lebensform Vivisektor konnte ich meine maximale Effizienz zurückerlangen. Ein Laie würde sagen, dass Martinax mich ins Leben zurückgeholt hat. Leider konnte er mein Vertrebalimplantat nicht retten." {n}Der Genetor gibt ein klagendes binhärisches Signal von sich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "The professionalism of the Vivisector life form made it possible for me to regain maximum achievable efficiency. A layperson would say that Martinax brought me back to life. Unfortunately, he was unable to save my vertebral implant." {n}The Genetor emits a plaintive binharic signal.{/n}
